steps.name: Implement input validation guards
steps.criteria: calculate_delivery_fee raises ValueError('Weight cannot be negative.') for weight_kg < 0; raises ValueError('Weight exceeds maximum allowed (100.0 kg).') for weight_kg > 100.0; accepts 0.0 and 100.0 without error

steps.name: Implement tiered weight cost calculation
steps.criteria: calculate_delivery_fee(weight_kg, Zone.A) returns (BASE_RATE + tiered_weight_cost) * 1.0 rounded to 2dp; tiers: 0-5kg at 1.00/kg, 5-20kg at 1.50/kg, >20kg at 2.00/kg; BASE_RATE=5.00

steps.name: Implement zone multiplier application
steps.criteria: calculate_delivery_fee(weight_kg, Zone.B) applies 1.5x to full subtotal (BASE_RATE + weight_cost); Zone.C applies 2.5x; multiplier wraps entire subtotal not just weight_cost

steps.name: Implement express delivery surcharge
steps.criteria: calculate_delivery_fee(weight_kg, zone, express=True) adds EXPRESS_SURCHARGE=15.00 after zone multiplication; express=False adds nothing; default is False

steps.name: Fix Testing Theater in TestInputValidation (post-review revision)
steps.criteria: test_zero_weight_is_valid asserts result==5.00; test_maximum_weight_is_valid asserts result==192.50; remove tautological isinstance and circular round() assertions
